ogTitle: Bathumi vs Baw Baw: Climate Safety

heading: Bathumi vs Baw Baw — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bathumi, Victoria and Baw Baw, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bathumi has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Baw Baw (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bathumi or Baw Baw safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bathumi has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Baw Baw scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bathumi scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Baw Baw scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bathumi or Baw Baw?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bathumi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
